---
title: "Maggie Moss"
subtitle: "Volcanology • Petrology • Geochemistry"
image: 2025_ProfilePic.jpg

title-block-banner: true

about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maggiejmoss/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maggiemoss96
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:maggie.moss@colostate.edu
---

[**News & Updates**](---
title: "Maggie Moss"
subtitle: "Volcanology • Petrology • Geochemistry"
image: 2025_ProfilePic.jpg

# Hero banner
title-block-banner: true

# About section styling
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maggiejmoss/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maggiemoss96
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:maggie.moss@colostate.edu
---)

[Moss will present an abstract of her research, Petrologic and Geophysical Synthesis of the Magmatic System at Akutan Volcano, at the American Geophysical Union Annual Meeting on 12/18](---
title: "Maggie Moss"
subtitle: "Volcanology • Petrology • Geochemistry"
image: 2025_ProfilePic.jpg

# Hero banner
title-block-banner: true

# About section styling
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maggiejmoss/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maggiemoss96
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:maggie.moss@colostate.edu
---)

[Moss will present with Dr. Xiaotao Yang on Akutan Volcano at the SZ4D-supported workshop "Research Prioritization in the Alaska-Aleutian Arc" on 12/14](---
title: "Maggie Moss"
subtitle: "Volcanology • Petrology • Geochemistry"
image: 2025_ProfilePic.jpg

# Hero banner
title-block-banner: true

# About section styling
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maggiejmoss/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maggiemoss96
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:maggie.moss@colostate.edu
---)

```{r}
1 + 1
```
